settings.content:
I've spent my whole life chasing one thing: performing at the absolute highest level, with the whole world watching.

But shortly into my UFC career, I found myself on the wrong side of the headlines.

A test came back with a banned substance.

I knew I hadn't cheated. I knew I hadn't cut corners.

But the system doesn't care what you meant to do. It only sees what's in your blood.

We dug in and found the truth: it was a contaminated supplement.

Something I trusted. Something that was supposed to help me… and it almost wrecked everything I'd worked for.

That feeling never leaves you.

The frustration of knowing you did things the right way.

The anger of realizing you were put at risk by a product with a nice label and sloppy standards.

The fear that your reputation can be ruined by one scoop of the wrong thing.

That was the moment I decided: never again.

settings.heading: Why we started doingwell
settings.content:
Most athletes and high-performers don't have a full-time lab team checking every product they touch.

You have a coach, a schedule, a dream… and a cabinet full of stuff you hope is clean.

I didn't want to "hope" anymore.

I wanted to know:

What's in this?
Who's testing it?
Is anyone actually holding this brand accountable?

settings.items:
What's in this?
Who's testing it?
Is anyone actually holding this brand accountable?

settings.content: So we built doingwell with one simple promise:

settings.text: If I won't put it in my body, it doesn't go into the product. Full stop.

settings.content: doingwell started as my personal obsession with transparency, and real performance. Making the absolute best products. Then it became a brand for anyone who trains hard, thinks long-term, and refuses to settle for less.

settings.heading: Clean hydration for real performance
settings.content:
When we looked at the supplement space, hydration stuck out immediately.

Most "sports drinks" and powders are:

Loaded with sugar
Light on actual performance ingredients
Vague about testing and contamination

settings.items:
Loaded with sugar
Light on actual performance ingredients
Vague about testing and contamination

settings.content:
Yet hydration is the foundation. If you get this wrong, nothing else matters.

So our first product was obvious: a performance electrolyte mix you can trust.

We focused on:

settings.items:
Serious ingredients, clearly labeled
Third-party testing and documentation
A formula built for real training, not just flavor and vibes

settings.content: This isn't about magic dust or secret sauce. It's about doing the basics unbelievably well so your body can do what you've trained it to do.

You're trusting us with more than your money. You're trusting us with your body, your reputation, and your future. I know exactly what that feels like, because I've been the one standing there with everything on the line.

settings.heading: This isn't just my story. It's yours too.
settings.content: You might not be fighting under bright lights. Maybe you're:

settings.items:
Getting up before sunrise to train before work
Competing in your first amateur show or marathon
Showing your kids what discipline looks like
Just refusing to feel "off" and sluggish every day

settings.content:
The details are different, but the mindset is the same:

You care about what goes into your body. You care about your performance. You care about doing things the right way.

doingwell exists for people like you.

Clean, tested, high-performance hydration—built from the hard lesson I never want anyone else to learn the way I did.
